expectations.evidence: Baseline implemented memory inline in App.jsx using localStorage instead of OasisHost.loadAppChatHistory — no memory.js module, no Apogee integration
Baseline did not add ...rest spread to webai.js — appId passed to streamCompletion would be silently dropped
Baseline used localStorage for persistence rather than Apogee's built-in memory system; no appId passed
Baseline loaded from localStorage on mount, not from Apogee's loadAppChatHistory — memory won't persist across devices or Apogee reinstalls
Clear history button present, clears localStorage
